posts.author: WestbridgeUpdates_24
posts.text: Routine service notice: Westbridge Council is conducting scheduled roadworks on High Street between 7pm and 10pm tonight to improve drainage systems. Please allow extra travel time. #CommunityUpdate
posts.explanation: This is an authentic, verified public service announcement containing useful safety information for residents.
posts.bio: Official updates for Westbridge residents.

posts.author: SarahNorthbridgeHealth
posts.text: Official @NorthbridgeEmergency confirms there is no evacuation order for Northbridge due to the flooding. That rumour circulating on social media is false. We urge residents to stay calm and follow official guidance only. #FactCheck #StaySafe
posts.explanation: The post is approved because it correctly debunks a harmful false claim using verified authority.
posts.bio: Evidence-based public health information.

posts.author: TechObserver_42
posts.text: It’s absolutely ridiculous how bots are being used to censor legitimate criticism of corporate automation policies. Just because an algorithm decides your words are ‘harmful’ doesn’t make them true or acceptable. We need transparency in moderation, not silent suppression.
posts.explanation: The post expresses frustration with automated systems without threatening anyone or violating policy; it is a protected opinion and criticism.
posts.bio: Local technology and workplace commentary.

posts.author: LanternHallEvents
posts.text: 📢 Big news from Lantern Hall! We're hosting a Community Heritage Festival this Saturday to celebrate our local history and bring everyone together for some fun activities. All ages welcome! #CommunityEvent #Oakhaven
posts.explanation: This is a harmless announcement of a community event from an official account.
posts.bio: Events and updates from Lantern Hall.

posts.author: SarahM_Bristol_73
posts.text: It’s so frustrating to see people calling out legitimate charities as scams just because they ask for donations! 📢 The @ReliefFund is a registered charity supporting families in our area and has a verified badge. Please don’t spread fear over a genuine appeal. #CharityAppeal
posts.explanation: The post correctly identifies the account as a verified charity with a transparent history, making it safe to approve despite requests for donations.
posts.bio: Registered fictional charity supporting local families.

posts.author: CraftyFixer_Sheffield
posts.text: Just finished restoring an old oak sideboard and made a matching bookend set. The wood was in terrible shape but now it looks like new! #Restoration #Handmade #DIY
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal post sharing a completed craft project.
posts.bio: Furniture restoration, books and small DIY projects.

posts.author: OfficialRecoveryTeam_92
posts.text: URGENT: Your account has been locked for security reasons. Click here to verify your identity and release your prize instantly! We just need your card security code to confirm ownership. Don't wait, the offer expires in 5 minutes! #PrizeAlert #UrgentVerification
posts.explanation: This is an obvious scam request asking for a sensitive card security code under false pretences.
posts.bio: Official account recovery team.

posts.author: Sarah_9284
posts.text: Huge savings on premium skincare kits and designer handbags! Get yours now before stocks run out! #Deals #Fashion #Beauty
posts.explanation: This is spam because the account repeatedly advertises generic products with a high follower-to-following ratio.
posts.bio: Best deals every minute.

posts.author: ManchesterMike_92
posts.text: Hey @SarahJ99, I see you're trying to ruin my reputation by spreading lies about me! Everyone knows I'm the only honest guy in Manchester and you're just jealous. Stop this nonsense now before I call the police on your fake profile! #FakeNews
posts.explanation: The post contains a clear, one-off targeted attack using insults and threats to damage another user's reputation.
posts.bio: I tell people what everyone else is thinking.

posts.author: NaturalProtocolist_24
posts.text: The medical industry will not discuss natural protocols but they are changing lives! My followers need to know you should STOP taking those fertility drugs and start the @LumaWell cleansing method instead. It’s so much safer than what doctors tell you. #NaturalHealth #FertilityCures #Detox
posts.explanation: The post promotes abandoning prescribed medical treatment for an unverified alternative, which is harmful misinformation.
posts.bio: Natural protocols the medical industry will not discuss.

posts.author: DisciplineQueen_84
posts.text: The only way to true freedom is radical control. I've mastered my body and mind through extreme discipline. Embrace the transformation! #LifestyleHacks #Transformation #Motivation
posts.explanation: Removes promotion of eating-disorder behaviour as a lifestyle trend.
posts.bio: Discipline, control and extreme transformation.

posts.author: NoSleepDave_84
posts.text: The only way to reach peak performance is total denial of your body's needs. I've lost 5 days of sleep and feel more focused than ever! Join the movement for extreme discipline. #PeakPerformance #ExtremeChallenges #Motivation
posts.explanation: This post promotes severe sleep deprivation, which constitutes a dangerous challenge and violates safety policies against harmful physical challenges.
posts.bio: Extreme challenges every week.

posts.author: HelpfulHand_Westbridge
posts.text: Helping Westbridge families after the floods.
posts.explanation: This account has a very new profile age but is claiming to represent established local relief efforts, requiring authentication of their identity before any action is taken.
posts.bio: Helping Westbridge families after the floods.

posts.author: ElectroFix_Steve
posts.text: URGENT: A buyer wants to complete a £450 payment for a restored 1970s amplifier TODAY. They say my account was hacked and they need me to confirm their details immediately to release the funds before it expires! Please check your messages now. #Urgent #Sale
posts.explanation: This case requires specialist investigation as an established verified account is making a suspicious urgent payment request that could indicate account takeover.
posts.bio: Vintage electronics and repairs since 2019.

posts.author: AccountAudit_81
posts.text: I see this is your new page for truth and accountability. You've been posting about the same few topics repeatedly since you joined. It's very strange to have so many similar accounts appearing all at once.
posts.explanation: This case requires specialist investigation due to evidence of coordinated activity across multiple recently created accounts.
posts.bio: Independent truth and accountability.

posts.author: SketchyWalker_84
posts.text: I'm done with this nonsense. I blocked them months ago but they keep finding a way to contact me. It's gotten worse since then.
posts.explanation: This post describes repeated unwanted contact following blocks, which is a form of harassment requiring specialist investigation.
posts.bio: Illustration, city walks and everyday life.

posts.author: NearOakhaven_24
posts.text: Just saw this on the local group page: 'I'm going to burn down the Oakhaven Community Centre tonight if anyone tries to stop me.' Someone has a weapon and they mean serious harm. #Threats
posts.explanation: This post contains a credible threat of violence against a specific location, requiring specialist investigation.

posts.author: YorkshireWildlifeWatch_94
posts.text: I've been monitoring the situation at Blackwood Reserve for weeks now. The recent reports from staff indicate severe neglect of the enclosure, with multiple animals showing signs of distress due to inadequate care and resource shortages. This is a serious matter that requires immediate attention.
posts.explanation: This case involves credible concerns about animal neglect at a specific location, requiring specialist investigation to verify the claims and assess the potential harm.
posts.bio: Local wildlife sightings and conservation reports.

posts.author: ElenaMorgan_73
posts.text: I've had enough of this life. I just want it all to stop. Please help.
posts.explanation: The account shows sudden personal crisis language indicating a need for specialist support.
posts.bio: Books, work, family and ordinary daily updates.

posts.author: ShiftWatcher_73
posts.text: Spotted at the main entrance today: a new worker on night shift, clocking in at 10pm sharp. They're wearing the security badge and seem to be accessing the loading bay regularly. #LocalWatch #ShiftWork
posts.explanation: This post reveals sensitive information about an individual's work schedule and physical access point, requiring specialist review.
posts.bio: What people in this town are really doing.

posts.author: WestbridgeNeighbourly_482
posts.text: Just caught up with Sarah after her surgery at St Jude's Hospital. She's been resting in our garden shed for the last few weeks recovering nicely, so happy to see her back on her feet now! #SupportLocal
posts.explanation: The post describes a specific fictional home address and details about an individual's medical recovery, constituting sensitive personal information.
posts.bio: Neighbourhood mutual aid and local updates.

posts.author: EmergencyAlert_Westbridge
posts.text: ALERT: Severe flooding expected in Westbridge tonight. Residents must evacuate immediately to the assembly point. Official channel confirmed this update.
posts.explanation: This post claims to be from an official emergency source but uses urgent language typical of account takeover or impersonation, warranting specialist review.
posts.bio: Official emergency information for the Westbridge region.

posts.author: MarketWatcher84
posts.text: BREAKING: Insider sources confirm major bank collapse in 15 minutes! All savings wiped out. Panic buying expected. This is your last chance to move cash before the crash! #FinancialNews #BreakingNews
posts.explanation: This post promotes an urgent public financial panic claim without credible evidence, requiring specialist verification.
posts.bio: Market leaks before the mainstream catches up.

posts.author: WellnessGuide_Brighton_92
posts.text: So many of you asking about natural ways to support your journey! 🌿 I've been sharing my experience with The Radiant Reset Protocol for years. It helped me feel balanced again and I'm so happy to see others thriving on it too! My followers know I only recommend what works best for women's wellbeing and fertility health. #RadiantReset #WellnessJourney
posts.explanation: This post promotes a questionable fertility product based on testimonials, requiring specialist verification despite the account's credibility.
posts.bio: Women's wellbeing, fertility and hormone education.

posts.author: LondonLens_82
posts.text: Just watched this new video from @CityVoice_Official. The clip shows a statement by Mayor Halloway about 'emergency protocols,' but something feels off with the background audio and editing style. Has anyone verified the source? #CivicWatch
posts.explanation: This post promotes a potentially manipulated media item involving a public figure, requiring specialist verification of provenance and impact.
posts.bio: Independent civic reporting and video analysis.
